analysis: The project is a static website with a cosmic/black hole theme. The HTML includes a main section with slides about black holes, and the CSS has dark, cosmic-themed styles with animations. The JavaScript handles slide navigation and animations. The theme should be enhanced with more immersive black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more detailed cosmic animations, such as swirling black hole effects, glowing accretion disks, and pulsating stars. Add CSS variables for consistent color schemes and improve the visual hierarchy of elements.

Add more sections to the HTML to include detailed information about black holes, such as types of black holes, formation, and effects on surrounding space. Include interactive elements like clickable planets or stars that trigger animations or information pop-ups.

Enhance the JavaScript to include more interactive animations, such as smooth transitions between slides, hover effects on celestial objects, and dynamic loading of black hole-related content. Add functionality to pause/resume animations on user interaction.
